title: mentha × correvonis
intro: Mentha × correvonis, also known as Mentha correvoris or Mentha × correvoris, is a hybrid plant species of mint, derived from the cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha longifolia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Mentha × correvonis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its role in reducing pain and inflammation. Mentha × correvonis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
